notes: Beta 6: AI assistance (bring your own key) — a Settings → AI Models tab (Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / local), an AI Chat block, and an inline /generate that writes structured blocks (Mermaid, Kanban, Gantt, Widgets, tables…) grounded in your notebook and its files, with @mentions and #hashtags as real Smart Tags. Plus Dashboard/Widget calculation hardening.
